name: DNC War Room
subject: We need one more Republican
body:
Betsy DeVos is completely unqualified to be Secretary of Education.
---
**Add your name: stand with Democrats against Betsy DeVos.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-DeVos1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170206_dnc_nd&source=em_20170206_dnc_nd")**
This week, the Senate will vote to confirm or deny Trump's nominee for education secretary, Betsy DeVos.

Senate Democrats are united against DeVos, whose background features efforts to destroy public schools in Michigan and reroute government funding to private schools -- hardly justification to make her Secretary of Education.

Two GOP Senators have also committed to voting against DeVos, which means that we need one more Republican to stand on our side in order to keep DeVos away from our education system.

Help make sure the rest of the Senate gets the message -- **add your name to denounce Betsy DeVos' nomination now and call on Republicans to reject her:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-DeVos1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170206_dnc_nd&source=em_20170206_dnc_nd")**
Thanks so much,

DNC War Room

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c605/4067b0a/2c24b80a9/7e7b8e2a/683214226/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170206_dnc_nd&source=em_20170206_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c605/4067b0a/2c24b80a9/7e7b8e2b/683214226/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170206_dnc_nd&source=em_20170206_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c605/4067b0a/2c24b80a9/7e7b8e28/683214226/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170206_dnc_nd&source=em_20170206_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c605/4067b0a/2c24b80a9/7e7b8e29/683214226/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170206_dnc_nd&source=em_20170206_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Brice Barnes
subject: about last week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
| Friend,

Before Trump landed in Florida, we wanted to send a big message that Floridians are united against his agenda of hate.

The good news is we hit our goal, and I want to take a moment to thank everyone who stepped up to support us. Your donations make sure we can keep the pressure up on Trump, Rick Scott, and the rest of the GOP.

With the confirmation vote for Betsy DeVos, attempts to repeal Obamacare, and hearings for Trump's Supreme Court pick coming up, your support is more critical than ever.

Together, we'll make sure to hold Trump accountable and show Americans are united against his hateful agenda.

Thanks,
Brice

P.S. - If you didn't have a chance to chip in last week, that's okay! [**Click here to rush a gift now so we can keep our efforts up >>**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fdp-grassroots-support?refcode=em020617&amount=3&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+rush+a+gift+now+so+we+can+&utm_campaign=em020617&source=em020617")

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b21f/1a5213b3/7503e93c/718bdab5/1306821199/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI3NTAzZTkzYyIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiMjFmIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/7503e93c/77b4b21f?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=em020617&source=em020617") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: BREAKING - Democrats are holding the floor of the Senate.
body:
Right now, Senate Democrats are holding the floor for 24 hours and all through night to oppose Betsy DeVos' confirmation to Secretary of Education.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Last week, you made over 10,000 calls and logged 40,000 minutes on the phones asking Senators to use the full 30 hours of debate time in opposition to Trump's unqualified cabinet nominees - and they listened.
Right now, Senate Democrats are holding the floor for 24 hours and all through the night to oppose Betsy DeVos' confirmation to Secretary of Education.The vote count in the Senate currently stands at a 50/50 tie.
**You could make the call that changes the vote on our next Secretary of Education. [Will you call your senators and encourage them to vote against the confirmation of Betsy DeVos? The Republicans cannot afford another defection, and we cannot afford Betsy DeVos.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-block-devos/?source=em170206-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-block-devos/?source=em170206-full")**
If you believe in quality education for all people and rejecting big money influence in politics, this is your chance to make your voice heard and impact the future of our education system.
Not only is DeVos shockingly unqualified -- her record of gutting funding from public schools and colluding with for-profit charter school CEOs risks the future of public education and the promise of a bright future for our children.
Our education system should not be doled out as a token for one of Trump's largest campaign donors, or up for grabs by the highest bidder.
[**Betsy DeVos is unqualified and must be stopped **-** and your senator could cast the vote that will stop her. Call your senators now and demand they vote no on DeVos.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-block-devos/?source=em170206-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-block-devos/?source=em170206-full")
Together, we can win this vote and put a dent in Trump's dangerous agenda.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CALL YOUR SENATOR NOW»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-block-devos/?source=em170206-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/senate-block-devos/?source=em170206-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123").
